description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:2.5-alpine Docker image. Add a pages job that runs only on the master branch, caches the vendor directory, and publishes the public/ folder as a GitLab Pages artifact with a 1‑hour expiration. In the job script execute apk add --update build-base nodejs tzdata, then gem install bundler --no-ri --no-rdoc, ruby --version, gem --version, bundle --version, bundle install --path vendor --retry=3, and finally rake build. The job deploys the generated site to GitLab Pages.
